vanillaarmory:itemdesc-forlorn-shield: A symbol of an ancient order's promise to defend those who couldn't defend themselves. The light it gives off is reminiscent of a bygone age. With this shield, we defend humanity.
vanillaarmory:itemdesc-throwingstick-woo: <font color="#99c9f9">A throwing stick made with a wooden head. </font>
vanillaarmory:itemdesc-throwingstick-bon: <font color="#99c9f9">A throwing stick made with a bone head. </font>
vanillaarmory:itemdesc-throwingstick-cop: <font color="#99c9f9">A throwing stick made with a copper head. </font>
vanillaarmory:itemdesc-throwingstick-tin: <font color="#99c9f9">A throwing stick made with a tin bronze head. </font>
vanillaarmory:itemdesc-throwingstick-bla: <font color="#99c9f9">A throwing stick made with a black bronze head. </font>
vanillaarmory:itemdesc-throwingstick-bis: <font color="#99c9f9">A throwing stick made with a bismith bronze head. </font>
vanillaarmory:itemdesc-throwingstick-iro: A throwing stick made with a iron head. I call this the bonk stick.
vanillaarmory:itemdesc-throwingstick-met: A throwing stick made with a meteoric iron head. Violence with a stellar twist.
vanillaarmory:itemdesc-throwingstick-ste: A throwing stick made with a steel head. Did you really have to go that far?
vanillaarmory:itemdesc-buckler-*: A small shield, less protective but easier to produce and use.
vanillaarmory:itemdesc-axe-double-relic0: Coaxed back to shape with a hammer and returned from a time lost using prima materia. It's still quite brittle and needs to be reforged.
vanillaarmory:itemdesc-axe-double-relic1: The prima materia helps it to remember the forge of the master smiths of the lost kingdoms. still not made of ideal material.
vanillaarmory:itemdesc-axe-double-relic2: One step closer to a perfected form.
vanillaarmory:itemdesc-axe-double-relic3: The weapon almost reforges itself now, like the spirits of smiths long since past inhabit it.
vanillaarmory:itemdesc-axe-double-relic5: From a time that never was and never will be.
